message: 3 distinct border-radius literals found (4px, 9px, 13px). Use 1-2 named tokens from a radius scale; concentric radii (outer = inner + padding) should derive from those tokens, not be hand-picked per component.
radial-gradient inside a hero/banner selector (".hero") is the canonical AI-slop hero background. Replace with an editorial image, real product screenshot, or typography-first hero.

:hover/:active state uses hardcoded hex (#2244ee) while the file defines CSS custom properties. Derive the interactive state from a token (e.g. var(--c-brand-red-hover)) so theming and dark mode propagate. Selector: ".btn:hover"

:hover uses transform: translateY(...) for a hover-lift. The make-interfaces-feel-better tactical layer specifies scale-on-press (transform: scale(0.96) on :active), not translateY motion on hover. Selector: ".btn:hover"
